zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Newburgh於1135年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Robert de Beaumont, Seigneur de Neubourg32歲，母親Godechilde de Tosny27歲。他於1170年與Matilda de Glastonia在英國英格蘭多瑟特雲福利特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1192年享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特賓頓 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Newburgh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German   Neuburg   and Swedish, Norwegian or Danish   Nyberg  .

variants.name: Nyberg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Anders, Erik, Alvar, Astrid, Fredrik, Holger, Mats, Niels, Sten.
Swedish: ornamental name composed of the elements ny ‘new’ + berg ‘mountain, hill’. This surname is also found in Finland.
Norwegian and Danish: habitational name from a farmstead so named, of the same etymology as 1 above. Compare   Newburg  .

variants.name: Neuburg
meanings: German: habitational name from any of numerous places in Swabia, Bavaria, the Upper Palatinate, and Austria called Neuburg (‘new town’). Compare   Newburg  .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Newburgh was born in 1135, in Normandy, France, his father, Robert de Beaumont, Seigneur de Neubourg, was 32 and his mother, Godechilde de Tosny, was 27. He married Matilda de Glastonia in 1170, in Winfrith, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1192, at the age of 57, and was buried in Bindon Abbey, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Newburgh est né en 1135, à Normandie, France, son père, Robert de Beaumont, Seigneur de Neubourg, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Godechilde de Tosny, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Matilda de Glastonia en 1170, à Winfrith, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1192, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Bindon Abbey, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1170 in Winfrith, Dorset, England, United Kingdom Matilda de Glastonia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Newburgh è nato il nel 1135 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Robert de Beaumont, Seigneur de Neubourg, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Godechilde de Tosny, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Matilda de Glastonia nel 1170, nel Winfrith, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Newburghが1135年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Robert de Beaumont, Seigneur de Neubourgは32歳，母Godechilde de Tosnyは27歳であった。1170年にイギリスイギリスドールセトウィンフリスでMatilda de Glastoniaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1192年に57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトビンドン アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Newburgh(이)가 1135년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Beaumont, Seigneur de Neubourg(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Godechilde de Tosny(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1170년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 윈프리스에서 Matilda de Glastonia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1192년 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 빈던 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Newburgh nasceu em 1135, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert de Beaumont, Seigneur de Neubourg, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Godechilde de Tosny, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda de Glastonia em 1170, em Winfrith, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Newburgh родился в 1135 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert de Beaumont, Seigneur de Neubourg было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Godechilde de Tosny, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda de Glastonia в 1170 г. в местности винфрит, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1192 г. в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности биндон эбби, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.
